mapper.sql: SELECT cp.id, cp.user_id, u.username, cp.name, cp.phone, cp.profile_image_url, cp.introduction, cp.education, cp.awards, cp.certifications, cp.updated_at FROM coach_profile cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_profile (user_id, name, phone, profile_image_url, introduction, education, awards, certifications) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{introduction}, #{education}, #{awards}, #{certifications})
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_profile SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, introduction = #{introduction}, education = #{education}, awards = #{awards}, certifications = #{certifications} WHERE id = #{id}
